seo.title: Contact RECPL
seo.description: Get in touch with Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. for NDT testing, third party inspection, structural audit, and equipment supply in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.description: We’re here to help you with all your engineering, testing, inspection, and equipment supply needs.

form.title: Send an Enquiry
form.description: Fill in the details below and our team will get back to you.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your requirement, site condition, inspection need, or equipment enquiry...
form.successMessage: Enquiry captured. Our engineering team will respond within 24 hours.

location.title: Our Location
location.description: Visit our office or reach us using the details below. Emergency inspections are available on request.
